title: hieracium murorum subsp. neritodon
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. neritodon, also known as Hawkweed, is a specific species of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. neritodon include its potential to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
